articles.title: Taylor Farms pulls all iceberg lettuce sourced in central Mexico from U.S. market - The Washington Post
articles.description: The company had earlier announced it was removing some lettuce from the U.S. market but must now notify customers and work to recover affected products amid the cyclosporiasis outbreak.

articles.description: SpaceX shares tumbled on Friday, erasing more than $1 trillion in market value from the rocket and artificial intelligence giant’s all-time high.

articles.title: FAA says Boeing can resume self-certifying its jets as airworthy - AP News
articles.description: The Federal Aviation Administration says Boeing will be allowed to take responsibility for certifying all of its 737 Max and 787 planes starting next week. The FAA took over 737 Max approvals in 2019, after two crashes were blamed on a new software system Boe…

articles.title: Consumer sentiment surges due to lower gas prices - CNN
articles.description: Lower gas prices helped Americans feel more optimistic about the economy early this month, though that relief might be short lived if the conflict in the Middle East continues to intensify.

articles.title: China’s Powerful New Moonshot AI Model Closes Gap With US Rivals - Bloomberg.com
